title: adenophora axilliflora
intro: Adenophora axilliflora, also known as White Aconite or Ba Jiao Gan, is a perennial plant native to China and parts of Asia, characterized by its white flowers and yellowish-green foliage. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its anti-inflammatory and sedative properties, derived from its alkaloid compounds, specifically adenolide and adenine. The medicinal properties of Adenophora axilliflora include pain relief, reduced fever, and improved sleep quality, making it a potential treatment for conditions such as arthritis, insomnia, and anxiety. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, as well as in traditional Chinese medicine formulas, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
